CanonicalizationRule.description: Canonicalization rule applied before hashing or signature verification.

version.description: Schema version for the canonicalization contract.

stripped_custom_section_prefix.description:
Strip any custom section whose name starts with this prefix before
hashing the module for signature verification.

bundle_section_name.description:
Logical container name used for the module bundle record within the
delivery artifact.

ModuleBundleEntry.description: One payload carried inside the module bundle.

role.description: High-level semantic role of the payload.

section_name.description:
Optional logical section name within the bundle, for example
`sds.authorization`.

type_ref.description:
SDS/shared-module schema identity when the payload is itself a
FlatBuffer. Stored as canonical JSON text for portability.

media_type.description: Optional media type for transitional payloads such as JSON envelopes.

flags.description: Implementation-defined bit flags for signed/encrypted/compressed state.

payload.description:
Embedded payload bytes. For single-file deployment this should be
populated for every entry.

description.description: Human-readable description for tooling and diagnostics.

MBL.description: Metadata stored in the REC trailer for one module delivery artifact.

canonicalization.description: Canonicalization rule used to compute module hashes.

canonical_module_hash.description: SHA-256 of the wasm module after stripping SDS-owned custom sections.

manifest_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical plugin manifest bytes.

manifest_export_symbol.description: Legacy ABI export retained for backward compatibility.

manifest_size_symbol.description: Legacy ABI export retained for backward compatibility.
